128.output:
The user interface for this task is a command line interface (CLI). Please use the following commands to interact with the system:

To submit an experience:
```bash
submit-experience <title> <description>
```

To view submitted experiences:
```bash
view-experiences
```

To accept an experience:
```bash
accept-experience <experience_id>
```

To reject an experience:
```bash
reject-experience <experience_id>
```

For more information, type `help`
